response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with strong fundamentals in TypeScript/Node.js, testing discipline, and some recent exposure to MCP and agentic workflows at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, or cloud-based AI platforms required for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role. The AI experience appears recent (6 months) and tooling-focused rather than building production AI solutions at scale.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with TypeScript, Node.js, and diverse language experience
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Proven mentorship and technical leadership via workshops, talks, and founding open-source projects
concerns: No demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization
Limited cloud-platform AI work — AWS CDK mentioned but no GCP/Azure AI services or production GenAI deployments
AI/GenAI exposure is recent and brief (~6 months) rather than the 8+ years of AI solution-building required

key_factors.factor: Lack of RAG/vector DB/production GenAI experience
